overview.description: The State Street SPDR Bloomberg 3-12 Month T-Bill ETF (BILS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of US Treasury bills with maturities between 3-12 months. BILS was launched on Sep 23, 2020 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: Bloomberg 3-12 Month U.S. Treasury Bill Index
